title: 目標達成の後に・オグリン！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a reward for her success in her G1 races, I
treat Oguri Cap to dinner at a restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She eats a lot to restore her energy for her next
goal, the autumn Tenno Sho.
